site.title: Osteria Bellavista
site.metaTitle: Osteria Bellavista | Ticino Cuisine with Lake View
site.description: Book your table at Osteria Bellavista. Ticino tradition, local ingredients, lake view. An authentic culinary experience since 1987.

hero.title: A cuisine that tells the story of the territory

about.title: Our Story
about.subtitle: Since 1987
about.description: Osteria Bellavista represents the harmony between Ticino tradition and the beauty of Lake Lugano. For over 35 years we have brought the authentic flavors of the territory to the table, selecting local and seasonal ingredients.
about.philosophy: We believe in the purity of ingredients and respect for tradition. Every dish tells a story of our territory.

chef.name: Chef Carlo Bernasconi
chef.title: Executive Chef
chef.bio: With over 30 years of experience in Ticino cuisine, Chef Carlo brings the tradition of the territory to every dish. Trained in the best osterias of Valtellina and Ticino.

sommelier.name: Luca Cavadini
sommelier.title: Sommelier
sommelier.bio: Expert in Ticino and Italian wines, Luca curates our cellar selecting the best labels from the territory.

antipasti.name: Valtellina Bresaola
antipasti.description: Bresaola carpaccio, arugula, grana flakes, lemon oil

antipasti.name: Beef Tartare
antipasti.description: Ticino beef, marinated yolk, Torricella capers, croutons

antipasti.name: Mushroom Risotto
antipasti.description: Carnaroli risotto, porcini and chanterelles, black truffle oil

primi.name: Valtellina Pizzoccheri
primi.description: Buckwheat pasta, cabbage, potatoes, Bitto cheese, sage

primi.name: Ravioli di Magro
primi.description: Filled with ricotta and spinach, butter and sage, toasted pine nuts

primi.name: Polenta Concia
primi.description: Taragna polenta, Fontina Valle d'Aosta cheese, butter

secondi.name: Beef Fillet
secondi.description: Selected cut 300g, Barolo reduction, roast potatoes

secondi.name: Milanese Cutlet
secondi.description: Veal loin, artisan breadcrumbs, arugula side

secondi.name: Sea Salt Sea Bass
secondi.description: Whole cooked in salt crust, evo oil, lemon

dolci.name: House Tiramisù
dolci.description: Mascarpone, ladyfingers, coffee, bitter cocoa powder

dolci.name: Berry Panna Cotta
dolci.description: Bourbon vanilla, berry coulis, fresh mint

dolci.name: Hazelnut Cake
dolci.description: Piedmont hazelnuts, dark chocolate, hazelnut ice cream

vini.name: Ticino Merlot DOC
vini.description: Cantina Orsi, Sottoceneri - Intense and structured

vini.name: Ticino Chardonnay DOC
vini.description: Cantina Monti, Mendrisiotto - Fresh and mineral

vini.name: Nebbiolo delle Alpi
vini.description: Riserva DOC, Valtellina - Elegant and long-lived

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Discover the atmosphere of our spaces and the beauty of our dishes.

reservation.title: Reservations
reservation.description: Book your table for an unforgettable evening with a view of Lake Lugano.

form.name: Full Name
form.success: Reservation requested successfully! We will confirm via email shortly.
form.error: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again or call us.

reservation.cancellation: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before.

location.title: Where We Are & Hours
location.description: Find us in the heart of Lugano, with a breathtaking view of the lake.

events.title: Events & Experiences
events.subtitle: Join Us
events.description: From sunset dinners to Ticino wine tastings, experience Osteria Bellavista in a new light.

sunsetDinner.name: Sunset Dinner
sunsetDinner.description: A romantic experience on our panoramic terrace as the sun sets over Lake Lugano. 4-course tasting menu with wine pairing.

wineTasting.name: Ticino Wine Tasting
wineTasting.description: Journey through the Ticino vineyards with the guidance of our sommelier. Discover the unique flavors of our terroir.

privateEvent.name: Private Event
privateEvent.description: Celebrate special moments in our private lounge with lake view. Customized menu and dedicated service to make every occasion unique.

newsletterModal.title: A Gift from the Kitchen
newsletterModal.description: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive exclusive invites and seasonal menu previews.
newsletterModal.success: Thank you! You're on the list.
